questions.question: Minimalist photography is best described as…
options: Simplifying the image to a few essential elements
Filling the frame with as much detail as possible
Shooting only in black and white
questions.reviewHint: Minimalism strips an image back to a few essential elements for simplicity and impact.

questions.question: Negative space in minimalist photography is usually…
options: Generous - often most of the frame
questions.reviewHint: Minimalist images typically use large amounts of negative space around a small subject.

questions.question: In minimalist work, the subject is often…
options: Small within the frame, surrounded by space
questions.reviewHint: A small subject within lots of space is a hallmark of minimalist composition.

questions.question: A minimalist image usually works best with…
questions.reviewHint: A restrained colour palette keeps the image clean and uncluttered.

questions.question: Why is a single strong focal point important in minimalism?
options: With so few elements, the subject must clearly hold attention
questions.reviewHint: Because there's little else in the frame, the one subject must be a clear focal point.

questions.question: Texture in a minimalist image is generally…
options: Kept minimal so it doesn't distract the eye
questions.reviewHint: Minimal texture keeps the image clean and avoids pulling the eye from the subject.

questions.question: Lines and shapes are used in minimalist photography to…
options: Add structure and interest without clutter
questions.reviewHint: Simple directional lines, shapes or repeating elements add interest while keeping it clean.

questions.question: Which subject placement suits minimalism well?
options: Off-centre with open space balancing the frame
questions.reviewHint: Off-centre placement with surrounding space supports the minimalist look.

questions.question: A common mood conveyed by minimalist images is…
questions.reviewHint: Simplicity and space tend to evoke calm, stillness or contemplation.

questions.question: Complementary colours can be used in minimalism to…
options: Create a clean, deliberate contrast that still feels simple
Add as many colours as possible
questions.reviewHint: A minimal palette can still use complementary colours for clean, intentional contrast.
